title: Pastry Party
description: Addon to Pastry Garden which is a mod that adds strawberry cows. This mod adds more type of cows.
body:
![Large logo of Pastry Party](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4aced3306a97ab81c3877dc4dc43b5400c603c4b.png)

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**PLEASE NOTE THIS MOD IS VERY BUGGY AND UNFINSIHED AS THIS MOD WAS MADE ON MCREATOR, MADE IN ONLY A FEW HOURS AND I SUCK AT CODING!**

</details>



> This mod is an addon to **[Pastry Garden](https://modrinth.com/mod/pastry-garden)** Which is a mod that adds **Strawberry Cows**

> [![optional pastry garden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9860c6db348a61c630cee811855719ab34d9a474_0.webp)
](https://modrinth.com/mod/pastry-garden)
